original_text: Key growth drivers for Amazon center on AWS cloud services and the advertising business, both identified as high-margin segments supporting earnings expectations [f3922ad9-85d8-409b-916a-444e08a6a248]. AWS provides compute, storage, database, analytics, and machine learning services to enterprises, representing a critical profit driver within the three-segment structure [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. The advertising business complements the retail ecosystem by enabling sellers and brands to reach customers across Amazon's platforms [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. Amazon was among the 'Magnificent Seven' technology companies reporting earnings in late July 2025, with combined market capitalization of approximately $11.3 trillion for the group facing investor scrutiny [95e75447-3c30-49f6-861e-b4c471cfa261, 7b554a0d-5f93-4e3a-8dd1-6077bc1dbb47]. Evidence on specific advertising revenue figures, AWS growth rates, and detailed segment profitability is not provided in the available data.
revised_text: Amazon.com, Inc. operates through three segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS) [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. The company engages in the retail sale of consumer products and subscriptions through online and physical stores in North America and internationally [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. AWS represents a critical segment within the company's three-segment structure [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. For FY 2025, Amazon reported revenue of $716,924,000,000 and operating income of $79,975,000,000 [4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc, 98d37e7b-d9b8-4798-8d78-32c8508a1ff4]. Evidence on specific advertising revenue figures, AWS growth rates, and detailed segment profitability is not provided in the available data.
changes_summary: Removed unsupported claims: (1) 'high-margin segments' descriptor as no chunk supports this characterization, (2) specific AWS service offerings (compute, storage, database, etc.) as chunk 43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42 only names AWS as a segment without detailing services, (3) advertising business description as no available chunk discusses Amazon's advertising segment, (4) 'Magnificent Seven' and $11.3 trillion market cap claims as chunks 95e75447-3c30-49f6-861e-b4c471cfa261 and 7b554a0d-5f93-4e3a-8dd1-6077bc1dbb47 are not in available evidence. Retained verified information about three-segment structure and added supported FY 2025 financial figures from available income statement chunks.
